## Operator Problem

What should become easier to inspect, approve, deny or audit?

## Proposed Panel Or Flow

Describe the panel, state, event or action review flow.

## Data Source

- [ ] Runtime API
- [ ] Readiness report
- [ ] Contract manifest
- [ ] Checkpoint registry
- [ ] Dataset/license manifest
- [ ] Static docs only

## Safety Boundary

- [ ] The console remains local-first.
- [ ] It does not expose secrets or private runtime state.
- [ ] It does not imply completed AGI or admitted production checkpoints.
